title: Still thinking about Sam — Snapchat-as-signal, Annapurna prep, Nepal honey-hunting
html:
Still thinking about Sam — Snapchat-as-signal, Annapurna prep, Nepal honey-hunting

Source: 2024-07-06 Apple Note. Two months post-the Sam breakup, Yahir admits to himself he's still posting on Snapchat just to see if she views it. Mixes that confession with Nepal trek logistics and a recurring cello-anxiety dream.

TL;DR

  • "Don't want to exactly admit it bc it feels like I'm succumbing to something. But I still think about Sam, a lot. It's not because I desire her or something super heartwrenching like that, but maybe bc I crave the hole she filled."
  • The Snapchat-as-signal habit: "I posted on Snapchat and waited until she saw it. That's the only thing that I really cared about, if she saw it." — the breakup is operational, not ideological.
  • Recurring cello dream: anxiety-dream of being back playing cello (which he bluffed competence in), feeling fundamentally exposed. "Feeling incompetent when that's not my area of competency and it's okay to admit it. What is though?"
  • Nepal bucket-list: Tamang Heritage Trail, Khukuri knife-making in Bhojpur, Tengboche/Kopan monastery meditation, fishing in Terai, honey hunting in Ghana Guang.
  • Souvenir list: tiger rug, khukuri knife. The trip will become real in the August Asia summer trip.

Pattern observed

Pairs with 2024 04 27 sam breakup script as the post-breakup arc: April = the cut, July = the residual phantom-limb pain. Yahir uses geographic distance (about to fly to Asia) as a stand-in for emotional distance. Same coping mechanism shows up before/after the Jo breakup (immediate Kentucky trip).

Open questions

  • The cello dream — is this the same anxiety-dream cluster as the COVID era tribal fight dreams? The pattern of "being singled out + exposed as incompetent" is the same.
  • Did honey-hunting in Ghana Guang ever happen?
